nodes.label: Product Vision
nodes.summary: Narriv is an Omnichannel Narrative Intelligence Platform: Signal → Intelligence → Recommendation → Action → Execution

nodes.label: End-to-End Data Flow
nodes.summary: 14-step flow: workspace → sources → Apify → fetch → raw save → normalize → dedup → OpenAI → signal_analysis → dashboard → alerts → clusters → action engine → reports

nodes.label: Product Goals (MVP/Growth/Full)
nodes.summary: MVP: ingestion+signals+AI+dashboard+alerts. Growth: intelligence+visibility+action+reports. Full: team workflow+roles+cases+AI execution assets

nodes.label: Technology Stack
nodes.summary: Frontend: Next.js+TS+Tailwind+Recharts+TanStack+RHF+Zod. Backend: NodeJS+TS+REST+BullMQ+Redis+Socket.io. DB: PostgreSQL+Prisma. AI: OpenAI. Data: Apify. Infra: Vercel+Railway/Render+Upstash

nodes.label: Environment & Credentials
nodes.summary: Required: APIFY_API_TOKEN, OPENAI_API_KEY, DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET. Optional: REDIS_URL, SMTP_*, S3_BUCKET_KEY, PUSHER_KEY

nodes.label: Core Data Model
nodes.summary: 11 main entities: User, Workspace, WorkspaceMember, Source, IngestionJob, RawDocument, Signal, SignalAnalysis, Alert, NarrativeCluster, Report, ActionPlan, GeneratedAsset

nodes.label: Database Tables V1
nodes.summary: Tables: users, workspaces, workspace_members, sources, ingestion_jobs, raw_documents, signals, signal_analysis, alerts, narrative_clusters, reports, action_plans, generated_assets

nodes.label: Narrative Taxonomy
nodes.summary: Mandatory taxonomy system for AI classification

nodes.label: Sentiment Types
nodes.summary: positive, neutral, negative, mixed

nodes.label: Narrative Types (18)
nodes.summary: campaign_response, corporate_reputation, customer_experience, service_issue, trust_issue, misinformation, policy_regulation, leadership_mention, media_escalation, competitor_comparison, viral_momentum, public_sentiment, community_reaction, influencer_amplification, crisis_event, product_perception, value_perception, brand_positioning

nodes.label: Stakeholder Types
nodes.summary: customer, public, media, regulator, employee, investor, influencer, partner

nodes.label: Impact Levels
nodes.summary: low, medium, high, critical

nodes.label: Omnichannel Data Coverage
nodes.summary: 5 channel categories via Apify: Web/News (portals, blogs, press, newsrooms), Social/Public (posts, accounts, comments, threads), Forums/Community (review sites, forums, boards, niche spaces), Video (title, description, tags, captions, comments), Podcast (show/episode title, description, notes, transcript)

nodes.label: Phase 1: Foundation
nodes.summary: Project skeleton, auth, app shell, Prisma setup, deploy baseline. Deliverable: login+signup+empty dashboard

nodes.label: Phase 2: Apify Ingestion Engine
nodes.summary: Apify module, ingestion service, normalization, deduplication. Deliverable: 1-3 source types ingesting

nodes.label: Phase 3: Signals Page Core
nodes.summary: Signals table, filters, search, detail view, pagination. Deliverable: usable signals feed with real data

nodes.label: Phase 4: AI Intelligence Engine
nodes.summary: OpenAI prompts, classification pipeline, confidence scoring, failure fallback. Deliverable: every signal gets sentiment+narrative+stakeholder+impact+summary+recommendation

nodes.label: Phase 5: Command Center Dashboard
nodes.summary: KPI formulas, chart time windows, real API connections, trend/breakdown/distribution charts. Deliverable: demo-ready dashboard

nodes.label: Phase 6: Alert Engine
nodes.summary: Alert categories, thresholds, severity mapping, status flow, scheduled jobs. Deliverable: risk/opportunity/positioning alerts live

nodes.label: Phase 7: Intelligence / Narrative Clusters
nodes.summary: Semantic grouping, cluster naming, cluster summary, trend clusters. Deliverable: narrative intelligence layer

nodes.label: Phase 8: Visibility / GEO
nodes.summary: Tracked queries, visibility score, recommendations. Deliverable: visibility/GEO page live

nodes.label: Phase 9: Reporting & Export
nodes.summary: Report templates, executive summary, CSV/PDF export, AI-generated summaries. Deliverable: management-ready reports

nodes.label: Phase 10: Action Engine
nodes.summary: Strategy generation, execution assets (press release, influencer brief, holding statement, FAQ, internal memo, campaign brief). Deliverable: decision+execution platform

nodes.label: Phase 11: Team Workflow / Scale
nodes.summary: Role management, case management, activity logs, notifications, audit logs, security hardening. Deliverable: production-ready SaaS team workflow

nodes.label: Priority 1 (Foundation)
nodes.summary: Phases 1-3

nodes.label: Priority 2 (Intelligence)
nodes.summary: Phases 4-5

nodes.label: Priority 3 (Alerts)
nodes.summary: Phases 6-7

nodes.label: Priority 4 (Strategic)
nodes.summary: Phases 8-9

nodes.label: Priority 5 (Execution)
nodes.summary: Phases 10-11

nodes.label: API Endpoints Spec
nodes.summary: Comprehensive endpoint listing: Auth (register/login/logout/me), Workspace (current), Sources (CRUD), Ingestion (run/jobs), Signals (list/detail), Dashboard (summary/volume/trend/distribution/latest), Alerts (list/detail/status), Intelligence (clusters), Visibility (summary/queries), Reports (list/generate/export), Action Plans (generate/detail), Generated Assets (generate)

nodes.label: UI Pages Spec
nodes.summary: Auth: Login, Signup. Product: Command Center, Signals, Intelligence, Alerts, Visibility, Reports, Action Plans. Workspace: Data Sources, Integrations, Activity Timeline, Case Management, Workspace Settings

nodes.label: Backend API Modules (17)
nodes.summary: auth, users, workspaces, sources, apify, ingestion, signals, ai, dashboard, alerts, intelligence, visibility, reports, action-plans, generated-assets, notifications, activity-log

nodes.label: Teams & Responsibilities
nodes.summary: Product (scope, taxonomy, alert/recommendation/output logic), UI/UX (Figma mapping, states, responsive desktop-first), Frontend (pages, tables, filters, charts, auth, app shell), Backend (auth, APIs, ingestion, queue, aggregation, alerts, reports, permissions), AI/Data (Apify strategy, normalization, OpenAI prompts, classification, clustering, recommendations), QA (data validity, duplicate detection, classification sanity, UI QA, auth & permissions, pagination/filter correctness)

nodes.label: Repo Structure & Branching
nodes.summary: Monorepo. Branching: main=production, dev=staging, feature/...=per task. Examples: feature/auth, feature/dashboard, feature/apify-ingestion, feature/ai-classification

nodes.label: AI Action Engine Outputs
nodes.summary: From 1 alert/cluster, AI generates: Strategic options (press release, influencer/KOL, social clarification). Press Release: draft, headline, tone, timing, channel. Influencer: campaign brief, objective, target audience, key message, deliverables, creator profile. Social Response: caption/script, FAQ, holding statement, community response template. Internal: memo, spokesperson points, Q&A prep

nodes.label: Generated Asset Types
nodes.summary: press_release, influencer_brief, holding_statement, faq, internal_memo, campaign_brief

nodes.label: Authentication Layouts (Sign In, Create Account, MFA)
